response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking or LAN-switch security technologies (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X), and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems including embedded-like environments (e.g., DLang, real-time systems)
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education, demonstrating initiative and communication skills
concerns: No C programming experience in UNIX/embedded context as required
No evidence of Linux kernel analysis or modification capability
No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement

key_factors.factor: Lack of network security domain knowledge
